title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
summary: Perpetua Resources obtained a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank to develop a gold and antimony mine in Idaho, supporting U.S. efforts to secure critical minerals domestically.
content: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.

zh.title: 矿业公司Perpetua Resources获得29亿美元美国贷款用于爱达荷州黄金和锑项目
zh.summary: Perpetua Resources从美国进出口银行获得了29亿美元贷款，用于开发爱达荷州的黄金和锑矿，支持美国在国内获取关键矿物的努力。

title: How Fanatics cornered the sports collectibles market
summary: As FIFA's exclusive collectibles licensee, Fanatics is positioned to capture the rapidly growing global sports collectibles market, though historical industry criticisms about authenticity persist.
content: As FIFA's exclusive collectibles licensee, Fanatics is set to tap a rapidly growing market in the world's largest sport, but longstanding criticisms follow.

zh.title: Fanatics如何垄断了体育收藏品市场
zh.summary: 作为FIFA的独家收藏品许可方，Fanatics有望捕获快速增长的全球体育收藏品市场，尽管历史上该行业对真伪性的批评仍然存在。

title: SpaceX scrubs test flight of massive Starship rocket, will retry Friday
summary: SpaceX postponed its Starship test launch but plans to retry Friday, with the timing significant given the company's recently released IPO prospectus and investor scrutiny.
content: SpaceX's attempted Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.

zh.title: SpaceX取消了大型星舰火箭的试飞，将在周五重试
zh.summary: SpaceX推迟了其星舰测试发射，但计划在周五重试，鉴于该公司最近发布的IPO招股说明书和投资者的关注，时机很重要。

title: Stock futures rise slightly as S&P 500 looks toward another winning week: Live updates
summary: Stock futures edged higher as the market heads toward another winning week, though volatility spiked due to sharp increases in long-term Treasury yields.
content: Volatility picked up this week as investors wrestled with a sharp rise in long-term Treasury yields.

title: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
summary: New dating services are emerging to address the widespread problem of fake profiles that plague established dating platforms, offering different verification approaches.
content: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.

title: 'Monitoring the situation': why young men are drawn to prediction markets
summary: Prediction markets have grown into a multi-billion-dollar industry that disproportionately attracts young men, reflecting broader trends in how this demographic engages with speculative platforms.
content: Prediction markets are a fast-growing, multi-billion-dollar industry, and appeal disproportionately to young men

zh.title: "监测局势"：为什么年轻男性被预测市场所吸引

title: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
summary: UK law enforcement agencies call for websites that fail to prevent children from viewing explicit content or being contacted by strangers to be blocked for users under 16.
content: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.

zh.title: 英国警察领导呼吁禁止16岁以下人员使用不安全平台

title: Police to score train firms on tackling sexual harassment
summary: The government will evaluate train operators on their efforts to combat sexual harassment, though it will not impose financial or legal penalties for failing to meet harassment reduction targets.
content: The government will not be financial or legal penalties for train operators who fail to meet the targets.

zh.title: 警察将对列车公司防控性骚扰的情况进行评分
zh.summary: 政府将评估列车运营商在应对性骚扰方面的努力，但不会对未达到性骚扰减少目标的企业实施经济或法律处罚。

title: Prepare for half term queues at Dover due to EU border process, port says
summary: Dover port warns of increased queues during the upcoming holiday period as the EU's new border system becomes fully operational for the first time during peak travel season.
content: It is the first holiday period since the EU's new border system was fully implemented.

zh.title: 多佛港警告：欧盟边境流程将导致半学期假期期间排队
zh.summary: 多佛港警告称，欧盟新边境系统首次在出行高峰期完全启动，将在即将到来的假期期间造成排队增加。

title: Oura, smart ring maker, confidentially files for IPO
summary: Oura, maker of health and wellness tracking smart rings, has confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC. The filing signals the company's readiness for public markets and reflects growing investor interest in wearable health technology.
content: Oura, the maker of the health and wellness tracking smart ring, has confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC.

zh.title: Oura智能戒指制造商秘密提交IPO申请
zh.summary: 健康和健身追踪智能戒指制造商Oura已向美国证券交易委员会秘密提交了IPO申请。该申请表明该公司已做好进入公开市场的准备，并反映了投资者对可穿戴健康技术日益增长的兴趣。

title: Spotify soars 15% after announcing AI music deal with UMG, guidance
summary: Spotify announced an AI music deal with UMG during its first investor day in four years, driving a 15% stock surge. The agreement and new co-CEO leadership underscore the company's strategic pivot toward AI-powered music features.
content: Spotify, which is holding its first investor day in four years, is now under the direction of co-CEOs Gustav Söderström and Alex Norström.

zh.title: Spotify宣布与UMG的AI音乐交易后股价上涨15%
zh.summary: Spotify在四年来首次投资者日期间宣布了与UMG的AI音乐交易，推动股价上涨15%。该协议和新的联合首席执行官领导强调了该公司向AI驱动音乐功能战略转变的举措。

title: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment
summary: Following Microsoft's $5 billion investment in Anthropic, the two companies are negotiating an AI chip deal centered on Microsoft's Maia 200 processors. Currently used internally in Microsoft's data centers, the chips offer better efficiency than competing silicon.
content: Microsoft has not made the Maia 200 chips available to customers, but it is used in the company's data centers, offering better efficiency than other silicon.

zh.title: Anthropic和Microsoft在50亿美元投资后进行AI芯片交易谈判
zh.summary: 在微软对Anthropic进行50亿美元投资后，两家公司正在就以微软Maia 200处理器为中心的AI芯片交易进行协商。这些芯片目前在微软的数据中心内部使用，提供比竞争对手硅更好的效率。

title: SpaceX, OpenAI valuations would mean they leapfrog Berkshire Hathaway on first day of trading
summary: Prediction market traders forecast SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic would each exceed $1.4 trillion valuations on their first trading day. This would place these AI and space companies above established firms like Berkshire Hathaway at IPO.
content: Traders on prediction market Polymarket think SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic on their first day of trading will surpass valuations of at least $1.4 trillion.

zh.title: SpaceX和OpenAI的估值将在上市首日超越伯克希尔哈撒韦公司
zh.summary: 预测市场交易员预测SpaceX、OpenAI和Anthropic在首个交易日的估值都将超过1.4万亿美元。这将使这些AI和太空公司在首次公开募股时超越伯克希尔哈撒韦等老牌企业。

title: How Walmart's gas price warning shapes our retail outlook — plus, Honeywell's quantum connection
summary: CNBC's Investing Club releases the Homestretch, a daily afternoon market update analyzing Walmart's gas price warning and its retail implications, plus Honeywell's quantum technology positioning. The update provides actionable trading insights for the final market hour.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 沃尔玛油价警告如何影响我们的零售前景——加上霍尼韦尔的量子连接
zh.summary: CNBC的投资俱乐部发布了《最后冲刺》，这是一份每日午间市场更新，分析沃尔玛的油价警告及其零售影响，以及霍尼韦尔的量子技术定位。该更新为最后一个交易小时提供了可行的交易洞察。

title: Walmart warns US shoppers are cutting spending as higher petrol prices bite
summary: Walmart warned U.S. consumers will likely cut spending in coming months as elevated gasoline prices strain household budgets. The warning signals weakening consumer demand and raises concerns for retail sector growth prospects.
content: The retail giant said it expects customers to cut back in the coming months due to higher pump prices.

zh.title: 沃尔玛警告美国购物者因油价上升而减少支出
zh.summary: 沃尔玛警告称，随着汽油价格上升对家庭预算造成压力，美国消费者在未来几个月可能会减少支出。这一警告表明消费者需求疲弱，引发了对零售业增长前景的担忧。

title: I’m 66 and have $85,000 in my HSA. When should I start spending it?
summary: A 66-year-old retiree seeks guidance on withdrawing $85,000 from an HSA, highlighting the lack of consensus on HSA drawdown timing. Few Americans accumulate substantial HSA balances, leaving limited financial planning guidance for this scenario.
content: Most people don’t save in an HSA, so there’s little consensus on when to start drawing down the funds.

zh.title: 我66岁,HSA账户中有85,000美元。我应该什么时候开始使用它?
zh.summary: 一位66岁的退休人士寻求关于从HSA中提取85,000美元的指导,突出了对HSA提取时间缺乏共识的问题。很少有美国人积累了大量HSA余额,这给这种情况下的财务规划指导留下了有限的空间。

title: An AI trade involving energy and infrastructure that's doubled your money, topping Nvidia
summary: Investors who allocated capital to AI infrastructure and energy companies have achieved returns exceeding Nvidia, one of the top AI stocks. This demonstrates the broader profit opportunity in companies supporting AI deployment beyond chipmakers.
content: If you put the same money into a basket of companies that are building out AI infrastructure and energy sources, you’ve done much better than stocks like Nvidia.

zh.title: 涉及能源和基础设施的AI交易已经使你的钱翻倍,超过了英伟达
zh.summary: 将资金分配给AI基础设施和能源公司的投资者获得了超过英伟达(顶级AI股票之一)的回报。这展示了在支持AI部署的芯片制造商之外的公司中更广泛的利润机会。

title: Trump’s AI executive order was set to feature voluntary participation by companies. He has delayed it.
summary: President Trump delayed signing his AI executive order after expressing dissatisfaction with certain provisions that emphasized voluntary company participation. The postponement suggests potential revisions before the order's finalization.
content: President Trump said Thursday that he had postponed a signing ceremony for the order because he “didn’t like certain aspects of it.” Here’s what’s going on.

zh.title: 特朗普的AI行政命令原定强调公司的自愿参与。他已经延迟了它。

title: Meta settles first U.S. case over school costs tied to youth mental health, court filing shows
summary: Meta resolved a lawsuit by a Kentucky school district over costs related to social media's impact on youth mental health, following similar settlements by YouTube, Snap, and TikTok. The case underscores mounting legal pressure on tech platforms regarding harm to young users.
content: The agreement fully resolves a lawsuit brought by a Kentucky school district following earlier settlements by co-defendants YouTube, Snap and TikTok.

zh.title: Meta解决涉及青少年心理健康学校成本的美国首起案件
zh.summary: Meta与肯塔基州学区就社交媒体对青少年心理健康影响相关的成本达成诉讼和解，紧随YouTube、Snap和TikTok的类似和解之后。该案件凸显了科技平台因对年轻用户造成伤害而面临的日益增加的法律压力。

title: Oil prices turn lower on hopes for Iran deal; crude supplies are declining as travel season starts Memorial Day weekend
summary: Oil prices declined on hopes for an Iran nuclear deal while crude supplies through the Strait of Hormuz remain critically low at 95% below normal levels. The supply constraint and approaching Memorial Day travel season create fuel price volatility.
content: Physical supplies of oil through the Strait of Hormuz are 95% below regular levels.

zh.title: 伊朗协议希望推低油价；纪念日周末旅游季节开始之际原油供应下降
zh.summary: 由于对伊朗核协议的希望，油价下跌，同时通过霍尔木兹海峡的原油供应仍严重不足，低于正常水平95%。供应限制和即将到来的纪念日旅游季节造成燃料价格波动。

title: Trump 'slush fund' a flashpoint as Senate heads home without funding DHS

content: GOP tensions over President Donald Trump's DOJ fund derail Senate attempt to pass immigration enforcement funding package.

title: Lawsuit over federal student loan caps highlights impact on nursing shortage

title: Now is the best time to open a gas credit card: Earn up to 15 cents off per gallon or 3X rewards on fuel
summary: Gas credit cards offering up to 15 cents per gallon discounts or 3X fuel rewards are increasingly attractive as gasoline prices have risen over 50% since late February. These cards can provide substantial savings during periods of elevated fuel costs.

content: The injection is different than Zepbound and Foundayo.

zh.title: 礼来的实验性注射剂产生28%的体重减少，超越Zepbound
zh.summary: 沃尔玛令人失望的盈利展望，以销售增长放缓和利润担忧为特征，与Target的更强劲表现形成鲜明对比，动摇了投资者信心。

title: Walmart sees slowing sales growth and warns of a profit miss, in contrast to rival Target
summary: President Trump signaled negotiating flexibility in nuclear talks, stating his willingness to allow Iran additional days to respond to U.S. peace proposals.
content: Walmart’s stock falls as investors express disappointment in the earnings outlook.

zh.title: 沃尔玛销售增长放缓并警告利润下滑，与竞争对手塔吉特形成对比
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在核谈判中表示谈判灵活性，声称他愿意允许伊朗额外几天时间来回应美国的和平提议。

title: Iran reviews U.S. peace proposal as Trump says he’s willing to wait 'a few days'
summary: Major Wall Street analysts released key calls and price targets Thursday for major tech and retail stocks including Nvidia, Meta, Amazon, and others.
content: It comes after President Donald Trump said he was prepared to wait a few more days to "get the right answers" from Tehran.

zh.title: 伊朗审议美国和平提议，特朗普表示愿意等待几天
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师周四发布了关键评级和目标价格，涉及英伟达、Meta、亚马逊等主要科技和零售股。

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls of the day: Nvidia, Meta, Dell, FedEx, Amazon, Etsy, ASML & more
summary: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.
content: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周四最大的分析师评级：英伟达、Meta、戴尔、联邦快递、亚马逊、Etsy、阿斯麦等
zh.summary: 以下是华尔街周四最大的评级。

title: European markets open lower as oil prices fall below $100
summary: European stocks are expected to open near flatline as oil prices fall below $100, reflecting investor caution amid macroeconomic and geopolitical concerns. Lower energy prices may provide some economic relief but indicate broader market uncertainty.
content: European stocks are expected to open around the flatline on Thursday as investors assess the latest macroeconomic and geopolitical news.

zh.title: 油价跌至100美元以下，欧洲市场开盘走低
zh.summary: 随着油价跌至100美元以下，欧洲股票预期开盘持平，反映了投资者在宏观经济和地缘政治担忧中的谨慎态度。较低的能源价格可能提供一些经济缓解，但表明更广泛的市场不确定性。

title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
summary: UK regulator Ofcom determined that TikTok and YouTube lack sufficient safety protections for children, though both platforms disputed the findings. The ruling highlights ongoing regulatory scrutiny of social media platforms' child protection measures.
content: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

zh.title: Ofcom称TikTok和YouTube对儿童"不够安全"
zh.summary: 英国监管机构Ofcom认定TikTok和YouTube缺乏对儿童的充分安全保护，尽管两个平台对这一裁决提出异议。该裁决突显了对社交媒体平台儿童保护措施的持续监管审查。

title: Wes Streeting pledges 'wealth tax that works'
summary: Labour leadership candidate Wes Streeting proposed capital gains tax reforms aimed at addressing wealth inequality. The reforms represent a key plank of his pitch to party members.
content: Wes Streeting is proposing reforms to capital gains tax, as part of his pitch for the Labour leadership.

zh.title: 韦斯·斯特里廷承诺"有效的财富税"
zh.summary: 工党领导候选人韦斯·斯特里廷提出资本利得税改革，旨在解决财富不平等问题。这些改革是他向党内成员提出的关键主张。

title: Japan’s megabanks post record profits, but analysts warn growth may slow as risks mount
summary: Japan's largest banks achieved record profitability, but analysts warn that higher credit costs and geopolitical risks may prevent sustained profit growth. The caution reflects emerging headwinds in an otherwise strong financial sector.
content: Japan's largest lenders may face some challenges to keep profit levels at record highs, amid higher credit costs and current geopolitical risks

zh.title: 日本大型银行创纪录利润，但分析师警告随着风险增加增长可能放缓
zh.summary: 日本最大的银行实现了创纪录的盈利，但分析师警告更高的信用成本和地缘政治风险可能阻止持续的利润增长。这种谨慎反映了在一个整体强劲的金融部门中出现的新兴逆风。

title: Children in England to be offered free bus trips this August
summary: UK Chancellor Rachel Reeves announced a £100 million program providing free bus fares for children in England during August. The initiative targets cost-of-living relief for families during the summer holidays.
content: Chancellor Rachel Reeves is to reveal a £100m fare-free bus scheme designed to relieve cost-of-living pressures.

zh.title: 英格兰儿童今年八月可获免费巴士车票
zh.summary: 英国财政大臣瑞秋·里夫斯宣布了一项价值1亿英镑的计划，为英格兰儿童在八月期间提供免费巴士票价。该计划旨在在暑假期间为家庭提供生活成本救济。

title: Elon Musk's X fined for not complying with Australia's child protection laws
summary: X (formerly Twitter) was fined A$650,000 plus legal costs by Australian regulators for failing to comply with child protection laws. The settlement concludes a three-year legal dispute over the platform's safety measures.
content: The social media giant will pay A$650,000 plus legal costs, ending a three-year legal saga.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的X因不遵守澳大利亚儿童保护法被罚款
zh.summary: X（前身为Twitter）因未能遵守儿童保护法而被澳大利亚监管机构罚款65万澳元加上法律费用。该和解结束了关于该平台安全措施的三年法律纠纷。

title: Samsung strike on hold as workers push for AI bonus
summary: Samsung workers suspended a planned strike while union members vote on a tentative agreement that includes demands for an AI-related bonus. The pause reflects ongoing wage and benefit negotiations between management and labor.
content: The walkout, which was due to start on Thursday, has been suspended while union members vote on a tentative deal.

zh.title: 三星罢工暂停，工人争取人工智能奖金
zh.summary: 三星工人暂停计划中的罢工，工会成员投票表决包含人工智能相关奖金要求的暂定协议。这次停顿反映了管理层与劳工之间持续进行的工资和福利谈判。

title: Three key takeaways from Putin's Beijing trip — and what they reveal about China-Russia ties
summary: Putin's Beijing visit produced declarations of enduring China-Russia friendship and multiple bilateral agreements, though Moscow failed to secure the energy deals it prioritized. The trip underscores both the strength and strategic limitations of the partnership.
content: Putin left Beijing with declarations of enduring friendship with China and a stack of bilateral agreements — but without the energy breakthrough Moscow desperately sought.

zh.title: 从普京北京之行看三个关键要点——及其对中俄关系的启示
zh.summary: 普京的北京访问产生了中俄友谊的声明和多项双边协议，尽管莫斯科未能获得其优先考虑的能源交易。该访问既体现了该伙伴关系的优势，也反映了其战略局限性。

title: The young people rejecting a bank-breaking prom
summary: Teenage entrepreneurs at Huntington School are transforming prom dress shopping to make it more affordable and accessible. The initiative challenges traditional expensive prom culture with more budget-friendly options.
content: Teenage entrepreneurs at Huntington School change the way pupils shop for a prom dress.

zh.title: 拒绝花费巨资毕业舞会的年轻人
zh.summary: 汉廷顿学校的少年企业家正在改变舞会礼服购物方式，使其更加经济实惠和易于获得。这项倡议用更经济的选择挑战传统昂贵的舞会文化。

title: Nvidia says it has ‘largely conceded’ China’s AI chip market to Huawei
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang acknowledged that the company has "largely conceded" China's advanced AI chip market to Huawei. The concession reflects both U.S. export restrictions and Huawei's competitive progress in the strategic sector.
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said the company has "largely conceded" China's advanced artificial intelligence chip market to Huawei.

zh.title: 英伟达表示已"基本放弃"中国AI芯片市场给华为
zh.summary: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋承认该公司已"基本放弃"中国先进AI芯片市场给华为。这一让步反映了美国出口限制和华为在战略部门的竞争进展。

title: From SALOs to SMIDs: How investors are trading the UK as political turmoil rattles British markets
summary: British financial markets have experienced volatility as Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces leadership pressure amid political turmoil. Investors are adjusting portfolio strategies and asset allocations in response to the political uncertainty.
content: British assets have been volatile in recent weeks, with Prime Minister Keir Starmer's leadership under pressure.

zh.title: 从SALOs到SMIDs：投资者如何在政治动荡中交易英国
zh.summary: 由于首相基尔·斯塔默面临政治动荡中的领导压力，英国金融市场经历了波动。投资者正在调整投资组合策略和资产配置以应对政治不确定性。

title: AI frenzy sees these European stocks gain over 100% this year in blockbuster rally
summary: Several European stocks have surged over 100% in 2026 as investor enthusiasm for AI drives a blockbuster rally. Europe's historically slower AI adoption is now capturing investor attention amid global AI investment frenzy.
content: Europe has long lagged behind the U.S. and China in AI, but these stocks are riding the wave of investor interest.

zh.title: AI热潮推动欧洲股票今年上涨超100%
zh.summary: 随着投资者对AI的热情推动了一场大规模上涨，几只欧洲股票在2026年上涨了超过100%。欧洲历来较慢的AI采用率现在在全球AI投资热潮中吸引了投资者的关注。

title: Mamdani fires back at Bezos over Queens teacher tax remark
summary: Mamdani countered Jeff Bezos's proposal to eliminate federal income taxes on lower earners by proposing a luxury second-home tax in New York City. The exchange reflects deeper debate over tax policy approaches.
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos called for eliminating federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners as Mamdani pushes a luxury second-home tax in New York City.

zh.title: 曼达尼就皇后区教师税收言论对贝索斯进行反驳
zh.summary: 曼达尼通过提议在纽约市征收豪宅第二套房产税来回应杰夫·贝索斯关于消除低收入者联邦所得税的提议。这一交锋反映了对税收政策方法的更深层次的辩论。

title: Your bond portfolio is facing a ‘termite’ infestation far worse than Jamie Dimon’s ‘cockroaches’
summary: Market watchers warn that bond portfolios face risks from opaque AI-backed loans and excessive leverage that gradually erode value, extending concerns about credit-market deterioration raised by JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon. These hidden risks pose potential systemic economic threats.
content: JP Morgan Chase CEO warned of credit-market  ‘cockroaches.’ But opaque AI loans and excessive leverage — ‘credit termites’ — are hollowing out the economy.

zh.title: 你的债券投资组合面临比杰米·戴蒙的"蟑螂"更严重的"白蚁"问题
zh.summary: 市场观察人士警告，债券投资组合面临来自不透明的人工智能支持贷款和过度杠杆化的风险，这些风险会逐渐侵蚀价值，扩大了摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙提出的信用市场恶化的担忧。这些隐藏的风险构成了潜在的系统性经济威胁。

title: SoftBank Group shares soar over 16% as Nvidia earnings signal strong AI momentum
summary: SoftBank Group shares rose over 16% following Nvidia's earnings announcement, reflecting strong momentum in the artificial intelligence sector. The company benefits from its stake in Arm Holdings, which supplies chip designs for AI servers and data centers powered by Nvidia systems.
content: SoftBank Group is closely tied to the AI boom through its stake in Arm Holdings, whose chip designs are used in AI servers and data centers powered by Nvidia systems.

zh.title: 软银集团股价飙升16%以上，英伟达财报显示强劲AI动能
zh.summary: 软银集团股价在英伟达财报公布后上涨16%以上，反映人工智能行业的强劲势头。该公司从其在Arm Holdings的股份中受益，Arm为由英伟达系统驱动的AI服务器和数据中心提供芯片设计。

title: SpaceX's historic IPO plans: Billions in losses and Musk's massive ownership
summary: SpaceX has filed for an initial public offering and plans to list on Nasdaq under ticker symbol SPCX, according to its SEC filing. The IPO marks a significant milestone for Elon Musk's rocket and satellite internet company.
content: SpaceX filed for an IPO and plans to list on Nasdaq under ticker SPCX, according to its SEC prospectus.

zh.title: SpaceX历史性IPO计划：数十亿美元亏损与马斯克庞大股权
zh.summary: 根据SpaceX的美国证交会申报文件，该公司已申请首次公开募股，计划在纳斯达克上市，股票代码为SPCX。此次IPO对埃隆·马斯克的火箭和卫星互联网公司来说是一个重要里程碑。

title: Japan exports jump 14.8% in April, beating expectations as semiconductor shipments soar
summary: Japan's exports surged 14.8% in April, significantly exceeding the 9.3% forecast from Reuters, driven by strong semiconductor shipments. The growth signals robust demand for Japanese tech products in global markets.
content: The figure outperformed the 9.3% estimate from Reuters.

zh.title: 日本4月出口增长14.8%，超出预期，半导体出货量飙升
zh.summary: 日本4月出口增长14.8%，远超路透社预测的9.3%，增长势头由强劲的半导体出货量驱动。这一增长表明对日本科技产品的全球需求强劲。

title: S&P 500 futures fall as traders analyze Nvidia earnings: Live updates
summary: S&P 500 futures declined as market participants assessed Nvidia's earnings results and implications for the broader market. The move follows the index ending a three-day losing streak on Wednesday.
content: The S&P 500 ended a three-day losing streak on Wednesday.

zh.title: 交易员分析英伟达财报，标普500期货下跌：实时更新
zh.summary: 随着市场参与者评估英伟达的财务结果及其对更广泛市场的影响，标普500期货下跌。这一举动紧随该指数周三结束三日连跌之后。

title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 snapped a three-day losing streak Wednesday as Treasury yields and oil prices retreated, signaling potential market recovery. Investors await Thursday's trading session to assess whether the rally gains momentum.
content: The S&P 500 snapped a three-day losing streak on Wednesday as Treasury yields and oil prices retreated.

zh.title: 周四的股市大新闻：下一交易日可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数在周三打破了三天的下跌趋势，原因是美债收益率和油价下跌，表明市场可能复苏。投资者在等待周四的交易时段来评估反弹是否获得动力。

title: Inside India newsletter: India’s investment appeal dims as firms and funds pivot to the U.S.
summary: Global investors and firms are increasingly shifting capital to the United States, drawn by AI-driven growth opportunities and 'America-first' policies, reducing India's investment appeal despite its status as the world's fastest-growing economy.
content: AI-driven growth and 'America-first' policies are pulling global capital to the U.S., challenging India's appeal as the fastest-growing economy.

zh.title: 印度内部通讯：随着公司和基金转向美国，印度的投资吸引力下降
zh.summary: 全球投资者和公司越来越多地将资本转向美国，被人工智能驱动的增长机会和"美国优先"政策所吸引，尽管印度是全球增长最快的经济体，但其投资吸引力却在下降。
